name: Consecrated Fanged Beast
title: Remnant Weed: Consecrated Fanged Beast
desc: A predator that has mutated after feeding from greater lifeforms. It now wields the power of frenzied vines.

attributes.source: Reward for accepting the Tavern Challenge at The Cat's Tail and claiming victory in a Friendly Fracas with the Consecrated Fanged Beast

skills.name: Siphon Wave
skills.desc: Deals ? ? and draws 1 Bonecruncher's Energy Block.

skills.name: Sprawling Blighted Vines
skills.desc: Deal ? ?. If there are Bonecruncher's Energy Block in your Hand, Discard 1 and prepare Skill: Sprouts of the Blighted Rot.

skills.name: Hunger from the Remains
skills.desc: (Passive) When battle begins, create 2 Bonecruncher's Energy Block and place them at the bottom of your Deck. You can play 1 extra Bonecruncher's Energy Block each Round.
